account.notes: No production athlete data is committed. Raw transcripts are ephemeral.

entities: redacted athlete profile with units/timezone/threshold shape
representative ride and run activity rows
one activity detail with intervals, splits, and messages
wellness rows including distinct sleepQuality and sleepScore fields
fitness trend and training summary rows
upcoming events and lightweight training-plan/workout-library rows
redactions: activity/event/workout IDs replaced with bracketed placeholders
dates shifted while preserving relative order and day spacing
private comments and account-specific labels replaced with [REDACTED_TEXT]
threshold values, body metrics, and wellness measurements replaced with synthetic values
API keys and credentials never captured

byte_policy.fixture_bytes: computed from committed redacted canonical JSON
byte_policy.live_recalibration: raw live median response bytes are measured before redaction; committed redacted median must remain within +/-1% per server
byte_policy.live_tolerance: +/-5% median response bytes unless the upstream account snapshot changed

reference_boundary.hhopke: MIT reference may be inspected but is not vendored
reference_boundary.mvilanova: GPL reference measured only as a black box via process execution and JSON-RPC output; no source read, copied, paraphrased, or transliterated
